description: Read-only permissions for Copilot, Agent, AI usage, billing transparency and governance reporting.

permissions.reason: Read Microsoft 365 usage and Copilot adoption reports where available.
Read tenant, users, groups and ownership context for governance mapping.
Read application and service principal inventory for agent and app governance context.
Read audit and sign-in context for governance checks where supported.
Read tenant policy context relevant to AI and access governance.
Read registered Microsoft 365 agents for inventory and governance reporting.
Read Copilot package metadata in application contexts.
Read Teams app catalog metadata to query available third-party apps.
Allow signed-in read sessions to inspect registered agents where delegated APIs are required.
Read Copilot package metadata in delegated contexts where app-only access is not available.
Read Teams app catalog in delegated sessions.

notes: Reader is read-only and must not contain write, budget, billing or destructive permissions.
Delegated permissions are consent metadata for signed-in flows; certificate-based app-only automation uses application permissions.
